title: JG Modpack
description: PBR JG resource pack + mod and dependencies. Free HD, PBR pack for medieval or modern builds.
body:
# JG Mod and Resource Pack Bundle

**One-stop for players using [JG's](https://modrinth.com/user/jason.gardner) mod and resource pack.**

This modpack bundles [PBR JG](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pbr-jg) resource pack with its mod, [JG Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jg-mod), plus other required mods and compatible shaders.

## Features

The modpack adds decorative blocks and models with HD labPBR textures. These blocks are made for either medieval or modern builds. The modpack also includes mod dependencies and other mods to enhance visuals while maintaining performance. (Still not great for potatoes.)

### For Bedrock Friends

A couple features have been added to appeal to players of [JG RTX](https://github.com/jasonjgardner/jg-rtx) who would like to try the Java mod:

[MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols) adds Xbox controller support in Java Minecraft.

[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) enables a rendering distance way beyond what is possible in Minecraft RTX.

## Contents

- PBR JG
- JG Mod

### Standard Libary
- Iris
- Fabric API
- Cloth Config API
- Sodium
- Lithium
- Mod Menu

### Optimizations
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- Particle Blocker
- Dynamic FPS
- MidnightControls

### Shaders
- Kappa
- Noble

### Visuals
- Bobby
- LambDynamicLights
- ETF
